message:
fix: u16 overflow in layout size summation

iter().sum::<u16>() wraps on overflow. With many large UI elements,
the sum could wrap to a small value, causing has_overflow() to miss
actual overflow and Flex layout to miscalculate available space.

Changed to saturating_add fold in 4 locations across debug.rs and
lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
